critical_issues.title: Missing required approval from rciapala
critical_issues.resolution: Approval must be provided by rciapala in GitHub PR review workflow; not changeable from repository code.

suggestions.title: Local settings key mismatch with runtime expectation
suggestions.resolution: Replaced STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME with DATA_STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME and added TRAPI_AUTH_SCOPE to match runtime-configured settings.

suggestions.title: TRAPI auth section lacked explicit credential/role setup guidance
suggestions.resolution: Added explicit Azure OpenAI RBAC role guidance and Azure CLI verification commands for local credential configuration.
